batchLiquidate(address[],address[]).details: Uses try-catch to ensure one failure doesn't revert the entire batch. Skips closed positions to save gas.

params._tokens: Array of asset addresses corresponding to the users.
params._traders: Array of user addresses to check/liquidate.

canLiquidate().details: Keepers should query this off-chain before broadcasting a transaction.

returns._0: bool True if neither the PositionManager nor Vault is paused.

claimStuckRewards().details: Acts as a decentralized bounty extraction for stuck keeper rewards.

params._positionManager: Address of the deployed PositionManager contract.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

rescueTokens(address,uint256).details: CRITICAL: Blocks withdrawal of PROTOCOL_ASSET to prevent owner from rug-pulling keeper rewards.

params._amount: Amount of tokens to transfer to the owner.
params._token: Address of the ERC20 token to rescue.

params._newSize: The new maximum array length for batch processing.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

POSITION_MANAGER().notice: Reference to the core protocol contract for fetching position data and executing liquidations.

PROTOCOL_ASSET().notice: protocol`s collateral asset (cached for security validation)

VAULT().notice: Reference to the protocol`s main Vault

batchLiquidate(address[],address[]).notice: Batch liquidates multiple positions in a single transaction.

canLiquidate().notice: Checks if liquidations can currently be processed.

claimStuckRewards().notice: Allows a keeper to manually claim rewards if auto-transfer failed during a batch run.

constructor.notice: Initializes the engine and links core contracts.

getMaxBatchSize().notice: Returns the current maximum batch size setting.

getPendingRewards().notice: Returns the pending rewards for this contract stored in the Vault.

maxBatchSize().notice: Maximum number of positions that can be liquidated in one transaction (prevents Out-Of-Gas)

rescueTokens(address,uint256).notice: Emergency function to rescue tokens accidentally sent to this contract.

setMaxBatchSize(uint256).notice: Updates the maximum batch size limit.
